creator: gabor.kovesdan@t-hosting.hu
text:
The plist is still wrong due to the PORTDOCS change. Could you fix this, 
please? I uploaded a build log to you here:
http://people.freebsd.org/~gabor/logs/verlihub-0.9.8.c_2,1.log
Anyway, I think the ideas behind these changes are cool and very 
demanded, so I hope you can fix it.

Cheers,
Gabor
